arts.ttl: Arsenal 'learn' Alexander Isak asking price as Newcastle 'set valuation' ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly told that Newcastle United will not let star forward Alexander Isak leave St James' Park for anything under £125m.

arts.ttl: How to watch Birmingham City vs Newcastle - TV channel, live steam and FA Cup kick-off time - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Birmingham City are in FA Cup action on Saturday evening when they take on Premier League side Newcastle United at St Andrew's @ Knighthead Park. Here, BirminghamMail takes a look at the TV info needed to be able to follow Birmingham City's clash with Newcastle in the FA Cup .

arts.ttl: How to watch Birmingham City vs Newcastle United - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: Newcastle United play League One pace-setters Birmingham City on Saturday with the Magpies looking to avoid an FA Cup fourth round upset. The FA Cup fourth round tie between Birmingham City and Newcastle United will be held on Saturday, February 8.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy, Lampard, Howe - FA Cup goals by current bosses

arts.ttl: May out as Stansfield returns in Birmingham City predicted XI for Newcastle
arts.sum: (4-2-3-1): Allsop; Laird, Klarer, Davies, Cochrane; Iwata, Gardner-Hickman; Dowell, Dykes, Anderson; Stansfield Blues do, of course, have an important League One match against Cambridge United on Tuesday but Newcastle isn’t a game where Davies can afford to hold anything back.

arts.ttl: Arsenal can bank £100m from these four sales to fund Alexander Isak transfer – opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal want Alexander Isak – that’s pretty much an open secret by now, and kind of obvious when you think about the Gunners’ need for a world class striker and how much the Newcastle front-man fits the bill. Isak won’t come cheap, though, with the latest reports on his future suggesting the Sweden international would […] The post Arsenal can bank £100m from these four sales to fund Alexander Isak transfer – opinion appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 'revolutionary' super stadium plans involved shock move away
arts.sum: As club historian Paul Joannou detailed, in Fortress St James', the site was inspected, concepts were drawn up for a £1m'super stadium' and, by 1968, the club applied for planning permission through Northumberland County Council, which Gosforth fell under at the time. The club were granted planning permission to build a new stadium in Gosforth several decades ago.

arts.ttl: Castore's Newcastle United dig as they hail 'transformational' Rangers kit deal for £1bn fortune
arts.sum: Castore, the sportswear brand, has credited its partnership with Rangers as being pivotal to its succes - while having a dig at Premier League clubs that they have partnered up with in the past. The company was Newcastle United's kit provider for just three years, before the Magpies brought a premature end to the deal.
